name: Bancroft Fund Limited 5.375% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares
summary: Bancroft Fund Limited 5.375% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares are preferred shares issued by Bancroft Fund Limited, a closed-end investment management company. These shares offer a fixed dividend payment of 5.375% per year and have a preference over common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution in the event of liquidation. Bancroft Fund invests primarily in equity securities.
